title: Malaxis stelidostachya
taxonomy: Malaxis stelidostachya is classified within the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. This species is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Malaxideae. Within the genus Malaxis, M. stelidostachya is a unique species characterized by its distinctive features and growth habits. The species is native to various regions, including parts of Asia and the Americas. The classification of M. stelidostachya is continually evolving as new research and discoveries are made.
